basics.name: Seunghyeong Yoo
basics.label: Ph.D. Student
basics.summary: I'm currently working toward the Ph.D. degree with SIC-X Lab. under the supervision of Prof. Jinseok Choi from Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST). My research interests include Massive MIMO, Beamforming, and Full-Duplex systems.

work.name: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST)
work.summary: Research on Wireless Communications, Massive MIMO, Cell-Free MIMO, and Beamforming. Currently working toward the Ph.D. degree under the supervision of Prof. Jinseok Choi.

work.name: Ulsan National Institute of Science and Technology (UNIST)
work.summary: Conducted research on Wireless Communications, Full-Duplex systems, and Beamforming.
